Full Stack Developer and AI/ML Enthusiast

Hi, I'm Sai Charan

I build scalable web apps and have hands-on experience with AI/ML projects.

I focus on products that are fast, practical, and easy to use, while also exploring machine learning solutions in areas like medical imaging and intelligent product features.

What I work with

Frontend Systems

Responsive interfaces built with React and Next.js, designed to feel clean, fast, and easy to navigate.

Backend Foundations

Practical server-side work with Node.js and Express for APIs, workflows, and real-world product features.

AI / ML Work

Model training, preprocessing, and evaluation for projects involving intelligent features and medical image analysis.

Projects

Selected work that shows how I build.

A mix of full-stack products and AI/ML experiments, with the first two featured up front and more available on demand.

AI Resume Builder

Next.js

A resume builder that helps users create stronger resumes with AI-assisted writing, ATS feedback, and export-ready output.

  • Next.js
  • MongoDB
  • Prisma
  • Gemini API
  • Generated resume sections with AI prompts tailored to role and experience.
  • Added ATS-style scoring to help users improve keyword coverage and structure.
  • Built export flow for polished, shareable resume PDFs.
View live projectGitHub

Task Management App

React

A focused task planner for day-to-day productivity with filtering, due dates, and persistent task state.

  • React
  • CSS
  • Bootstrap
  • Created a fast task flow for adding, editing, and organizing work in one screen.
  • Used filters and due-date states to help users prioritize what matters next.
  • Stored data locally so progress stays available between sessions.
View live projectGitHub
